title: An Nuhūd heat wave
lead: An Nuhūd is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.37. This extreme weather event has a Score of 10.0/10, indicating severe conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in An Nuhūd is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 40%, and the wind speed is 10.9 km/h, offering little relief. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
